title: laggera flava
intro: Laggera flava, also known as African bush tea or bitter leaf, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Laggera flava include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and aiding in the management of hypertension and diabetes. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine as a treatment for various ailments.
